DESCRIPTION: GET on an ID that does not exist returns 404, not a server error.
NAME: test_get_nonexistent_post_returns_404

DESCRIPTION: A standard user with correct credentials lands on the inventory page.
NAME: test_valid_login

DESCRIPTION: A locked-out user cannot log in even with correct credentials.
NAME: test_locked_out_user_is_blocked

DESCRIPTION: A user can add a product, check out, and see the order confirmation.
NAME: test_complete_checkout_end_to_end

DESCRIPTION: POST /posts creates a resource and echoes it back with an ID.
NAME: test_create_post_returns_201_with_new_id

DESCRIPTION: PUT /posts/1 updates the resource and returns the new values.
NAME: test_update_post_returns_200_with_changes

DESCRIPTION: A fresh session has no items in the cart.
NAME: test_cart_is_empty_by_default

DESCRIPTION: DELETE /posts/1 completes without error.
NAME: test_delete_post_returns_200

DESCRIPTION: Adding a product shows 1 on the cart badge.
NAME: test_add_product_updates_cart_badge

DESCRIPTION: The order summary shows a total greater than the item price alone.
NAME: test_order_total_includes_tax

DESCRIPTION: The inventory page shows all 6 products.
NAME: test_all_products_are_displayed

DESCRIPTION: Submitting customer info without a first name shows an error.
NAME: test_checkout_requires_first_name

DESCRIPTION: GET /posts/1 returns a post with all required fields.
NAME: test_get_single_post_has_expected_schema

DESCRIPTION: GET /posts responds within 3 seconds.
NAME: test_response_time_is_acceptable

DESCRIPTION: Removing the only product clears the cart badge.
NAME: test_remove_product_clears_cart_badge

DESCRIPTION: A wrong password shows the correct error message and blocks entry.
NAME: test_invalid_password_shows_error

DESCRIPTION: Sorting low-to-high puts prices in ascending order.
NAME: test_sort_products_by_price_low_to_high

DESCRIPTION: Sorting Z-to-A puts product names in reverse alphabetical order.
NAME: test_sort_products_by_name_z_to_a

DESCRIPTION: GET /posts returns 200 with the complete list of 100 posts.
NAME: test_get_all_posts_returns_200_and_full_list

DESCRIPTION: Products added on the inventory page show up in the cart.
NAME: test_added_products_appear_in_cart

DESCRIPTION: Continue shopping navigates back to the inventory page.
